positive: A stylized, maximalist floral arrangement mixed with abstract cosmic elements, featuring deep midnight blues, vibrant nebula purples, neon bioluminescent greens, and pops of metallic gold leaf. The composition should be circular and symmetrical, designed as a central motif perfect for apparel printing. Include highly detailed botanical illustrations (like stylized lily pads, monstera leaves, and exotic flowers) seamlessly merging with swirling, gaseous depictions of galaxies and constellations. Use a high-contrast, clean silhouette approach with clear separation between elements. Style: Art Nouveau meets Psychedelic Futurism. Lighting: Dramatic studio lighting with strong backlighting to enhance edges. Composition: Centered, repeating pattern potential, vector quality, high detail.
negative: blurry, artifacts, low detail, grainy, text, watermark, signature, logo, dirty, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, photographic, realistic photography, cinematic, muted colors
